content:
怕太長貓不會看，我盡量縮短一點 <@1487626955791663208> 

1.
既然要推最終法則了，角色體驗關卡設個選擇啟靈數，體驗開個可配備隊伍和為角色設置啟靈數，讓我們有一個直觀的方法知道你賣的+12值不值。

2.
體驗那邊或者喚醒體界面，可不可以有遊戲內的配置+配隊推薦和點讚推薦的功能？或者給角色點讚？不設角色留言了，感覺會增加管理成本。給角色點讚至少可以讓你們對角色廚數量有概念，方便出週邊。

3.
最終法則方面，比起數值加強，也許我們會更在意別的東西。都是角色廚/強度廚才會抽滿吧，那給個+12限定角色頭像/頭像框、個人界面背景裝飾、或者額外的繁衍狂熱劇情/角色故事，就這些可能五選二之類的推出來都能接受，只有通訊錄不夠吸引角色廚。

4.
這麼大的改動，不僅是要提前說，甚至應該在實裝之前先拿出來說。讓我們討論，這樣你又可以發現更多應改未改或者應有未有的東西。讓未來的計劃公開透明，數據留痕，下次(如果有)企劃或者角色設計抄襲事件，不需要你出手，自然就會有玩家維護你和我們的遊戲。

5.
想要典藏館/喚醒體界面放戰鬥小人讓我們可以放大看細節，也想要放大看看一些怪物設計，想要可以查看怪物和他們進攻動畫的功能，因為一些怪物真的很酷。

6.
我愛你和我們的遊戲，校貓，但是你真的讓人愛得很累，下次再有這樣的事我真的不會罵，我會用實質的行動證明我已經完全對你失去信任。即使你用ai敷衍我也沒關係，我最後再信你一次。但真的是最後一次，不要逼我離開我愛的角色和遊戲。
还在对你游制作人抱有幻想呢
萬一他其實是好人裝笨呢<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>

Hello.

Currently buying silver in morimens is done through dollars no matter where you're from, no matter the general financial situation of your country.

Meaning that when the Dollar is down, a lot of silver can be purchased for a lot cheaper. And players from countries with less valuable currency, may not be able to make purchases at a reasonable price at all.

There is an already existing solution and frameworks for this, this in general may help with the games financial situation.
The new Steam feature?
I mean it's not new. Most games use your local currency/yes steam adjust game prices depending on country automatically.
I think they rolled out an update that can give you even more precise global pricing conversions, if you select it
noooo I won't be able to escape my economics T^T

This is in reference to the Dreamsparks and Dreamshards given in the monthly rankings of "Taboo Quest".

This post is to ask if max Soulforge mats in the new Ranking system are behind a lowish rating and request that they are if that is not planned.

SF mats are important timegated resources for both endgame and new Arc2 players. Please put all of them behind a low rating so people don't feel pressured to get a high rating in every rotating game mode.

content:
We just had a Traphase event that the community gathered to win trade so they could just be done with it.

New update have rewards behind WINS in the PvP mode.

We also currently have a lot of silver and Gnosis+Refined Gnosis as Traphase rewards, I don't think this is how it should be.

I understand that in theory, winning takes more time than just conceding and it's probably harder for anyone trying to make accounts to sell, but in reality, it isn't. They can just do as I plan to do: find people to win trade.

Personally, I don't like PvP in general. Tried Traphase and it it's not bad, but also really isn't what I signed up when I started to play Morimens.
If it really has to be part of the game, make it COMPLETELY separate.  Make Traphase rewards only influence the mode itself. 

**My first and main point is: please give us an alternative. I love playing the game and wouldn't mind playing for double or even triple the time the 5 Traphase matches take so I can get the Silver and Gnosis. I just don't want to play PvP.

(BTW, having rewards for reaching 3k ELO points is not realistic for most players)

An option is bots. The game already has bots, just let me play them over and over for Traphase rewards.**

I really like to support the game because BIAV is creative, generous and so far it deserved. Making me play even more PvP changes things. I'm not a whale, but got my 60% increased XP and do my monthly contribution (and a bit more when they offer good deals). I'm seriously considering not paying while gacha and character progression rewards are behind playing PvP.

Made this suggestion in private when we get the "feedback email" many times, now I think it should be a public fight.

Really wanted to wait for things to calm down and make a post praising the team because Arachne looks great and Ethereal Cores, at least for me, are a decent solution against the parallel account market. But couldn't because I'm already worried that now I have to WIN Traphase matches.
thread_title: Personally tried to accept Traphase as part of the game. It's not working.

thread_title: Personally tried to accept Traphase as part of the game. It's not working.

content:
I understand your frustration with the rewards, but by the same metric, I don't like PDive (the weekly thing). It's boring, it's the same thing over and over again, I push myself to do it, but I don't feel like it's anything special or worth doing. Some weeks I don't do it, because I don't feel like it. Should I now demand that those rewards should be put somewhere else? I can assure you I'm not the only person who feels that way.

PVP in this game is good (in my personal opinion) and it's its own thing, which is why they try to entice people to play it. I think it's fair that silver and some upgrades are locked behind the rewards, the same way they are locked behind PDive. With all due respect, if we cater to groups of people who don't like certain modes over people who do enjoy them, it's not going to work.

It's fair to not play certain content if you don't enjoy it. Don't let FOMO take over, prioritize your own enjoyment. As far as I understand, the rotating modes will overlap, so that shouldn't be an issue. And as for rewards, let me, a PVP enjoyer, get my share of silver and upgrades since I don't like using PDive.

Edit: From VH's reply I assue they won't be overlapping, so that's something that should be changed.

thread_title: Personally tried to accept Traphase as part of the game. It's not working.

content:
This is fully your right. And I disagree about PVP. That's the point.

There are other games that do similar things - I recently returned to HSR and they have their TFT-like mode that is very different than the base game. New update will let you chose which mode you want to do in a week, but overall progression rewards are still tied to that mode. You either do it, or don't.

The rewards are used to entice people to play it, since gachas are very particular genre where players are used to getting rewarded in some manner for their time. PVP in this game doesn't care about extra copies/level investment of the character, so there are no PVP-specific rewards you can give people. All you need is one copy and you can do whatever you want with that character in PVP. Hence, there are no PVP-like rewards you could give people.

I like Traphase and am fine playing it regularly provided I have time!

There are a couple of limitations in Traphase that could be fixed to help players enjoy the mode more:

1. When you play Traphase, it is always PVP even if you are not confident at Traphase. There is no way to practice decks or get confident with Traphase. It is an entirely different video game.

It would be nice if there was a way of playing against the bot for both all-pick and draft mode as a training mode.

This would allow players to practice the game mode and learn what all the cards and effects do, without time pressures.

This would be relatively easy to implement as the bot is already created.

If after a while players are still a little unhappy about being forced to play PVP for a little bit of the monthly season, playing against the bot could also be made to count towards the needed wins. This would be a quite drastic change though.

2. The main reward from Traphase is the cool emotes. But you can only use these emotes in Traphase!

It would be nice if there was a way of using emotes outside Traphase. One way would be to add a system where you can send people on your friends list an emote message. Alternatively, using emotes as avatars. But one nice thing would be to be able to emote during normal Morimens fights. These emotes could be saved into the replay file, so watching a replay could include seeing silly emotes pop up that the player placed during the fight.

Finally, adding the ability for viewers of a replay to add their own emotes could be added. This could then work like Niconico or Twitch chat where the community could share their reactions to replays.

It would be great if both of these could be fixed: regular Morimens players would have an on-ramp to playing Traphase regularly, and there would be an account-wide benefit to playing Traphase.
thread_title: Traphase: two small features that would help it inside the monthly seasons

i appreciate your concern and you have a right to your opinions, however, coming into this thread is unnecessary like u said when u have no related inquiries about the refund.

refunds in gacha games are not uncommon and should not come as a surprise or shock when players request for it. 

as i have said in the beginning, a recently EOS-ed gacha game named black beacon did implement this system, where they refunded purchases on unused limited currency. 

I am not promoting nor encouraging players to quit, this is just to illustrate a reasonable refund practice used by another company, which the devs can choose to adopt if they are willing to refund players interested in one. 

If they have another way to do it, i am open to listen. 

What you said about contacting the bank and rolling back purchases is dangerous, in violation of server rules and could potentially get you in trouble. as it is related to “promoting behaviours that use loopholes or violate regulations”. 

For any interested players reading this thread please do not contact your banks to roll back your purchases and wait for game staff to reply.
